title: A Day of Fallen Night
author: Samantha Shannon
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "A Day of Fallen Night" book by Samantha Shannon?
Options:
A. His need for power has grown in this chaos. This fire will have convinced him that Clan Kuposa must seize its chance to rule, while the gods are at their weakest. I can imagine him performing a noble sacrifice of the Noziken. Epabo, Dumai said, thank you, for everything. I will lead the gods to avert his folly. She marched from the tent, into the freezing night, to collect what she would need. Dumai. Unora caught up to her, Nikeya just behind. You mustnt go. It could be a trap, a way of drawing you into the open I cant leave Suzu at his mercy, Dumai said firmly.
B. His appetite for power has expanded in this turmoil. This conflagration will have convinced him that Clan Kuposa should capitalize on its opportunity to govern, while the gods are feeble. I can picture him conducting a virtuous sacrifice of the Noziken. Epabo, Dumai said, thank you for everything. I will guide the gods to avert his stupidity. She moved from the tent, into the freezing night, to gather what she required. Dumai. Unora caught up with her, Nikeya right behind. You cannot go. It could be a trap, a means of luring you into the open. I cannot abandon Suzu to his compassion, Dumai said firmly.
C. His thirst for control has expanded amid this mayhem. This catastrophe will have convinced him that Clan Kuposa needs to take its opportunity to govern, while the gods are feeble. I can picture him doing a virtuous sacrifice of the Noziken. Epabo, Dumai said, thank you for everything. I will guide the gods to prevent his idiocy. She strode from the tent, into the freezing night, to gather what she required. Dumai. Unora caught up with her, Nikeya right behind. You can't go. It might be a trap, a means of luring you into the open. I can't abandon Suzu to his compassion, Dumai said firmly.
D. His craving for authority has grown in this disorder. This devastation will have persuaded him that Clan Kuposa should take its chance to rule, while the gods are weak. I can envision him performing a noble sacrifice of the Noziken. Epabo, Dumai said, thank you, for everything. I will lead the gods to stop his foolishness. She walked from the tent, into the freezing night, to collect what she needed. Dumai. Unora caught up to her, Nikeya just behind. You must not go. It could be a trap, a way of drawing you out into the open. I cannot leave Suzu at his mercy, Dumai said firmly.
